prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜排名从2021年第50名持续上升至2026年第43名，排名稳步提升，学校综合实力和认可度增强；该校在声誉舆情文件中未被收录，说明近年无明显负面舆情事件；抖音热度排名第27位（较热），张雪峰多次推荐该校水声工程、核工程等特色专业，短视频平台关注度较高， 报考热度有升温趋势；第五轮学科评估中控制科学与工程获评A级；船舶与海洋工程、水声工程、核工程与核技术等为该校传统优势特色方向，与招生专业中的 海洋工程类、水声工程、核工程与核技术等高度对应。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业持续高热推荐，与哈工程工科强校定位契合，相 关专业报考热度较高；河北省2026年普通高考总人数约60.98万，按近年比例估算物理类约36.5万人，较2025年36.3万人微增，整体竞争略有加剧，2025年物理 类本科批459分，近年呈稳中有升态势；哈尔滨工程大学位于黑龙江省哈尔滨市，距河北省较远，属跨省报考；该校在河北省招生规模较大（物理类200余人）， 属于该校在省外的主要生源省份之一，地域因素对报考影响相对中性。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2026年物理类缩招8.6%导致竞争加剧（位次前移）、软科排名持续上升提升学校吸引 力、抖音热度较高带动报考关注度、以及河北省考生总数微增等因素，在，考虑学校层次提升和热度上升带来的竞争加剧效应，预测2026年物 理类最低位次约11056名，区间10556–11556名。

- 自动化类（含自动化、机器人工程、人工智能等）。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text:
From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 14272 → 15439 → 14006 → 12000 → 11635, showing an overall trend of first decreasing and then increasing. Since 2023, rankings have moved forward for two consecutive years (intensified competition). The 2025 baseline is approximately 11635.
2. [Enrollment Plan] The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan: 2021: 238 → 2022: 227 → 2023: 216 → 2024: 248 → 2025: 268 → 2026: 245. In 2026, enrollment will decrease by 23 students (-8.6%) compared to 2025, tightening the enrollment plan and intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; its main ranking on the Soft Science Ranking has steadily risen from 50th in 2021 to 43rd in 2026, indicating continuous improvement in comprehensive strength and recognition. The school is not included in the reputation/public opinion file, indicating no significant negative public opinion incidents in recent years. It ranks 27th in Douyin popularity (relatively hot). Zhang Xuefeng has repeatedly recommended its distinctive majors such as Underwater Acoustics Engineering and Nuclear Engineering, indicating high attention on short video platforms and a warming trend in application popularity. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Control Science and Engineering was rated A-level. Naval Architecture and Ocean Engineering, Underwater Acoustics Engineering, and Nuclear Engineering and Nuclear Technology are its traditional advantageous and distinctive directions, highly corresponding to the enrollment majors such as Marine Engineering, Underwater Acoustics Engineering, and Nuclear Engineering and Nuclear Technology.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended, aligning with Harbin Engineering University's strong engineering positioning, leading to high application popularity for related majors. In 2026, the total number of candidates for the Hebei Province general college entrance examination is approximately 609,800. Based on recent years' proportions, the Physics Category is estimated to have about 365,000 candidates, a slight increase from 363,000 in 2025, indicating slightly intensified overall competition. In 2025, the Physics Category undergraduate batch score was 459, showing a steady upward trend in recent years. Harbin Engineering University is located in Harbin, Heilongjiang Province, which is relatively far from Hebei Province, making it a cross-provincial application. The university has a large enrollment scale in Hebei Province (over 200 in Physics Category), making it one of the main source provinces outside the province. The regional factor has a relatively neutral impact on applications.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the 8.6% enrollment reduction in Physics Category in 2026 leading to intensified competition (ranking moving forward), the continuous rise in Soft Science ranking enhancing the university's attractiveness, high Douyin popularity driving application attention, and a slight increase in the total number of candidates in Hebei Province, and taking into account the intensified competition effect from the school's level improvement and rising popularity, the predicted minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is approximately 11056, with a range of 10556–11556.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Computer Science (including Computer Science and Technology, etc.)
- Electronic Information (including Underwater Acoustics Engineering, Electronic Information Engineering, Communication Engineering, Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering)
- Automation (including Automation, Robotics Engineering, Artificial Intelligence, etc.)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Software Engineering (National Characteristic Demonstration College/National Special Software Innovation Class)
- Nuclear Engineering and Nuclear Technology (including Xinghai Leading Class)
- Marine Engineering (including Naval Architecture and Ocean Engineering, Marine Robotics, etc.)
- Aerospace (including Aircraft Design and Engineering, Aircraft Power Engineering, etc.)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Mechanical (including Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation, Industrial Design)
- Energy and Power (including Energy and Power Engineering, Marine Engineering)
- Materials (including Materials Science and Engineering, Chemical Engineering and Technology)
- Mathematics and Applied Mathematics (including Dual Degree Pilot Class)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 10556–11556, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main application direction, with Tier 1 majors as reach options (especially Computer Science, Electronic Information, and Automation), and Tier 3 majors as safety choices. For rankings significantly better than the upper limit of the range (<10556), focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors; for rankings near the lower limit of the range (>11556), it is recommended to mainly rely on Tier 3 majors as safety. The university has outstanding engineering strength, and the Automation-related majors corresponding to the A-level Control Science and Engineering discipline deserve special attention.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category fluctuated significantly: approximately 3142 → 3308 → 3808 → 3124 → 3521, with no clear unilateral trend. The 2025 baseline is about 3521. The provincial History Category enrollment plan changed from 12 students in 2021 → 22 in 2022 → 24 in 2023 → 3 in 2024 → 3 in 2025 → 22 in 2026. The 2026 plan surges from 3 to 22 students, an increase of about 633%, significantly expanding enrollment and greatly easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A Project 211 and Double First-Class university. Its Soft Science main ranking has steadily risen from 50th in 2021 to 43rd in 2026, indicating enhanced comprehensive strength and recognition. The university is not included in reputation/public opinion files, suggesting no significant negative incidents in recent years. Its Douyin popularity ranks 27th (relatively hot), with overall high attention. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Control Science and Engineering was rated A-level, but the History Category only offers Business Administration (including Business Management), which has low correlation with the advantageous discipline.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: Business Administration/Management majors have notably low social popularity, with weak application willingness. The total number of Hebei Province general college entrance examination takers in 2026 is about 609,800, with an estimated History Category count of about 245,000 based on recent proportions, a slight increase from 243,700 in 2025. The 2025 History Category undergraduate batch cutoff was 477 points. Harbin Engineering University is located in Heilongjiang Province, far from Hebei, making it a cross-province application. The History Category enrollment scale is small, so geographical factors have relatively limited impact on applications.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2026 History Category plan surge from 3 to 22 students (a massive expansion of about 633%), the cold social popularity of Business Administration majors, and the slight increase in total Hebei examinees, the actual ranking may shift backward slightly less than pure model predictions due to the large expansion but cold major popularity. The predicted 2026 History Category minimum ranking is about 16,700, with a range of 16,200–17,200.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- None (The university's History Category only offers Business Administration, with no other optional majors).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Business Administration (Does not admit candidates with single-color vision abnormalities).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: This university only admits Business Administration for History Category in Hebei. With the 2026 plan significantly expanding to 22 students, rankings within the predicted range of 16,200–17,200 have a high chance of admission. Due to the single major option and its cold social popularity, candidates are advised to carefully consider their interests and career plans before applying.
